title: Prepare potatoes and aromatics
description: Wash 1.2 kg potatoes thoroughly under cold running water, scrubbing to remove all dirt. Cut into 3-4 cm cubes or wedges, ensuring uniform size for even cooking. Peel and finely mince 3-4 cloves of garlic. Have ready 1 tsp dried oregano, 4 g sea salt, 100 ml dry white wine, 100 ml water, 40 ml extra virgin olive oil for finishing, and 15 g fresh chopped parsley or scallions. Organize all ingredients in mise en place for hot station.

title: Fry and braise potatoes to completion
description: Heat 150 ml olive oil in a large, deep pan over medium-high heat until shimmering. Add prepared potato cubes in batches to avoid overcrowding; fry for 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until golden brown on all sides. Add minced garlic, oregano, and salt; sauté for 1 minute until fragrant. Deglaze with 100 ml white wine, scraping pan bottom. Add 100 ml water, cover with lid, and reduce heat to medium. Simmer for 12-15 minutes until potatoes are fork-tender. Remove lid and cook uncovered for 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until excess liquid evaporates and potatoes have a light glaze. Finish with 40 ml extra virgin olive oil and fresh herbs, toss gently, and serve immediately while hot.
